text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I arrive at the cafeteria for
lunch.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Apple pie slices! They look so yummy...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... In children's stories all over the world, there
are lots of greedy bad guys that eat too much.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I eat a lot too... What if I turn evil?
choice_data_list: You've got plenty of time before that happens.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm going to resist. I don't want to turn into
a bad guy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I begin to notice Rice Shower carefully
watching her portion sizes.
